title: triticum × requienii
intro: Triticum × requienii, also known as spelt, is an ancient, hybridized species of wheat that is believed to be a cross between wheat and goat grass. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming spelt include improved digestion, reduced risk of heart disease, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular choice among those seeking a nutritious and natural food source. Spelt can be prepared in a variety of herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and supplements, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
